stories.title: Follow live: Canada get one back, Switzerland look...
Lakers' Reaves intends to sign a $185M extension
stories.summary: Lakers star Austin Reaves intends to sign a four-year, $185 million maximum contract to return to the franchise, with a player option for the final season in 2029-30, sources tell ESPN's Shams Charania.

stories.title: Pulisic ready, 'hoping to play' for U.S. vs. Türki...
stories.summary: United States men's national team attacker Christian Pulisic said he's ready to play in the USMNT's group stage finale on Thursday, but added he's "probably not ready" to play 90 minutes.

stories.title: Sources: Caps get Sabres' Tuch, add 8-year deal
stories.summary: Veteran forward Alex Tuch is getting an eight-year extension averaging $10.5 million a year from the Capitals after a trade with the Sabres, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: Jaguars, TE Strange agree to 3-year extension
stories.summary: The Jaguars and tight end Brenton Strange have agreed to terms on a three-year extension worth up to $48 million and including $25 million guaranteed, agents Jim Ivler, JR Roggio and Jon Perzley told NFL Network's Mike Garafolo and Tom Pelissero.
